## Issue Type

Please select the type that best describes your issue:

- [ ] **Missing API** — A glibc function is not yet listed in the index
- [ ] **Incorrect Data** — Wrong header, description, standard, or MT-Safe annotation
- [ ] **Broken Link** — A man7.org link returns 404 or points to the wrong page
- [ ] **Format Problem** — Table rendering or Markdown formatting issue
- [ ] **Other** — Something else

## Description

<!-- Provide a clear description of the issue. For missing APIs, include the function name and which module it belongs to. For incorrect data, specify what is wrong and the correct value. -->
